vec_Byte8Union Union Reference
[Vector Data Types]

A union structure for convenient access to members of a vec_byte8. More...

#include <vec_ops.h>


Data Fields

vec_byte8 packed
uint8_t array [8]

Detailed Description

A union structure for convenient access to members of a vec_byte8.

Field Documentation

vec_byte8 vec_Byte8Union::packed

Accessor for the packed data type.

uint8_t vec_Byte8Union::array[8]

Array version for individual access.
